response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product work, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators and agentic tooling). They demonstrate strong engineering craft (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), polyglot proficiency, cloud and container experience, and a testing-focused mindset that matches the role's quality emphasis. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin) and appear learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience plus current AI-agent and MCP development work
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, testing tools authorship, CI/CD, code quality focus
Broad polyglot and infrastructure experience (Java, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, MongoDB, SQL)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright experience mentioned
Frontend history leans on Ember.js; React exposure appears comparatively limited
No Kotlin and little recent Java, which the role lists for select backend services

key_factors.factor: AI agent development experience (MCP, agentic tooling)
Missing primary-stack specifics (Nest.js, Vitest, React depth)
